-- =============================================================================
-- Qahse.MBDL v0.1 standalone structural dynamics input
-- Format: sectioned text. Columns before " - " are parsed; text after it is comment.
-- =============================================================================

[Simulation]
0.0         StartTime          - s
2.0         Duration           - s
0.01        TimeStep           - s
9.80665     Gravity            - m/s^2, applied as global -Z
1           OutputEvery        - output every N integration steps
1           ChronoThreads      - Chrono worker threads
true        AutomaticGravity   - let Chrono FEA elements include gravity
SPARSE_LU   Solver             - SPARSE_LU or SPARSE_QR
EULER_IMPLICIT_LINEARIZED Timestepper - HHT/NEWMARK/TRAPEZOIDAL/EULER_IMPLICIT_LINEARIZED
./result    OutputDir          - result directory
MBDL_Demo   OutputName         - output file prefix

[Nodes]
-- id             x      y      z      fixed  nodal_mass  Ixx  Iyy  Izz
TowerBase         0.0    0.0    0.0    true   0.0         0.0  0.0  0.0
TowerTop          0.0    0.0    90.0   false  0.0         0.0  0.0  0.0

[BeamSections]
-- id       area   Iyy    Izz    J      E        G        density  rayleigh_alpha rayleigh_beta
TowerSteel 1.20   0.45   0.45   0.90   2.10e11  8.08e10  7850.0   0.0            1.0e-4

[Beams]
-- id     nodeA      nodeB     section     elements  ydir_x ydir_y ydir_z
Tower     TowerBase  TowerTop  TowerSteel  12        1.0    0.0    0.0

[RigidBodies]
-- id       x     y     z      rx ry rz  mass       Ixx       Iyy       Izz       fixed
Nacelle     0.0   0.0   90.0   0  0  0   240000.0   4.0e6     2.5e6     2.5e6     false

[Constraints]
-- id            type      target...
BaseFixed        FIX_NODE  TowerBase
TowerTopToRNA    MATE      NODE TowerTop BODY Nacelle true true true true true true

[PointLoads]
-- id        kind target    Fx       Fy Fz  Mx My Mz  local
TowerPush    NODE TowerTop  100000.0 0  0   0  0  0   false

[Outputs]
NODE TowerTop
BODY Nacelle
